system.description:
Requirement: The party cannot have a vehicle.

Time: Choose a number of days — the benefit lasts for each day spent on this activity.

By making a Survival check, an adventurer can locate the game trails, rocky ledges, or similar hidden paths through the current region. The party can use a Fast travel pace with no penalties to Perception or passive Perception.

Note:

  • This has no impact on difficult terrain penalties – see Trailblaze for possibilities for difficult terrain

  • These shortcuts tend toward rugged terrain, and if characters force march during this activity, any Constitution saving throws to resist fatigue are made with disadvantage

journeyProperties.criticalFailure: The party only manages to travel at a Normal pace, and the awkward paths taken cause the party to lose all of their Supply Dice / Supply. If the party has no Supply Dice / Supply to pay this penalty each character will suffer 2 levels of fatigue.
journeyProperties.failure: The party is able to travel at a Fast pace, but they are more distracted than anticipated, and suffer the usual penalties to Perception and passive Perception. The party also loses half their Supply Dice / Supply (rounded down). After any sharing occurs between characters, any party members with no Supply Dice / Supply to pay this penalty will suffer 1 level of fatigue.
journeyProperties.success: The party manages to travel at a Fast pace with no penalties to Perception or passive Perception.
journeyProperties.criticalSuccess: As success, but the party also gains a Boon or Discovery.
